titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 564

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=872 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 15:48:09.555167+00 | translation moa=873 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 15:48:09.565817+00

div.p:
D Rex Scot’ . et H suus filius . omnibus vicecomitibus suis cunctisque baronibus francis et anglicis . salutem .
Sciatis quod dedi et concessi hvic meo militi hernulfo . Swintun . in fevdam sibi et heredi
suo cum omnibus hominibus suisque pecuniis tenere bene et libere et honorifice . sicut vllus
ex meis baronibus melius ac liberius tenet . et quicquid ad eam pertinet . per easdem consuetudines per quas
Liulfus filius edulfi . et vdardus filius suus tenuerunt . tenere de sancto cuthberto et de me
. xl . solidos reddente monachis de dunelmia sine omnibus aliis seruiciis . Testibus Willelmo . filio
dunecan . et Maduc consule . et comite dunecan . et Radulfo Nuuel . et Marsel Marmiun . et
Walter filio alani . et herberto . Chamberlein . et adam filio edwardi . et Willelmo . de lindesi . ad hadintunia . Valete .

p.cl: David king of the Scots, and Henry his son, to all his sheriffs and each of his barons, French and English, greeting.

Know that I have given and conceded herein Swinton in feu to my knight Arnulf, to him and his heir with all his men and livestock, to hold well, freely and honourably, just any of my barons best and most freely holds, and whatever pertains to it, by the same customs by which Liulf son of Edulf and Udard his son held, to hold of Saint Cutherbert and of me by rendering 40 shillings to the monks of Durham without any other services.
